results.title: CodeReviewr – AI code review that charges per token, not per developer : CodeReviewr Discussion Forums | Product Hunt
results.content: CodeReviewr – AI code review that charges per token, not per developer : CodeReviewr Discussion Forums | Product Hunt [...] Title: CodeReviewr – AI code review that charges per token, not per developer : CodeReviewr Discussion Forums | Product Hunt [...] ### Product Forums. # CodeReviewr – AI code review that charges per token, not per developer. Last month I added up my developer subscriptions: $240/month. I was paying $30/month for a code review tool I used twice a week. That's $7.50 per review for something that should cost under $1. So I built CodeReviewr: AI-powered code review with pay-per-token pricing. Just pay for what you actually use. Solo developers and small teams do 5-20 code reviews per month, not 50-100.
